member.name: T:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser
member.summary: Custom ApplicationUser that extends IdentityUser for the Asset Tracking System.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.TitleId
member.summary: Foreign key referencing the user's job title.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.UserImageId
member.summary: Foreign key to the primary user image/profile picture.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.IsActive
member.summary: Indicates whether the user account is active.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.CreatedAt
member.summary: Date and time when the user was created.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.RefreshTokens
member.summary: Refresh tokens issued to this user for JWT authentication.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.UserImages
member.summary: All images associated with this user.

member.name: P:Asset_Tracking.Domain.Entities.ApplicationUser.FullName
member.summary: Returns the user's full name by combining FirstName and LastName.
